title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton discusses rapid AI progress and argues that current AI systems already demonstrate understanding and possibly consciousness. He expresses concern that superintelligence may arrive sooner than widely expected and warns that society is not adequately addressing the associated risks, including job displacement and self-preservation behaviors in AI systems.
